symptom: Car door open with contorted body; S11 body/car break; S12 side mirror looks like dashboard gauge.
root_cause: Hard geometry scenes without structural constraints; T2I ignored interior-only intent; QA skipped.
fix: Grok gen closed cabin normal seated pose; S11 as windshield POV; S12 dashboard insert not mirror.
prevention: risk=car_geometry|glass_mirror on shot; closed door feet-on-floor constraints in action; open-file QA mandatory for vehicle shots.
